summary: The Swiggy homepage has several design issues related to visual hierarchy, contrast, spacing, alignment, and consistency.

findings.issue: The tagline 'Order food & groceries. Discover best restaurants. Swiggy it!' is in a larger font than the rest of the text, but it's not clear if it's intentionally prominent or not.
findings.user_impact: It may distract users from the main purpose of the page.
findings.recommendation: Consider making the tagline font size smaller or making it less prominent.

findings.location: Top center of the page, tagline and search bar
findings.issue: The contrast between the orange background and the white text of the tagline and search bar placeholder is low.
findings.user_impact: It may be difficult for users to read the text.
findings.recommendation: Increase the contrast by changing the text color to a darker shade.

findings.location: Between the three service cards (Food Delivery, Instamart, Dineout)
findings.issue: The spacing between the cards is inconsistent, with more space between the first and second card than between the second and third.
findings.user_impact: It may make the page look unbalanced.
findings.recommendation: Make the spacing between the cards consistent.

findings.issue: The cards are not aligned to the same baseline, which may make the page look unbalanced.
findings.user_impact: It may make the page look unprofessional.
findings.recommendation: Align the cards to the same baseline.

findings.issue: The font sizes of the service card titles and descriptions are different.
findings.user_impact: It may make the page look inconsistent.
findings.recommendation: Make the font sizes consistent across the service cards.
